name: codex-cli
description: Codex CLI operations, automation, diagnostics, live thread supervision, plugin and MCP lifecycle, session log forensics, and local environment actions.

interface.shortDescription: Operate, automate, supervise, and debug Codex safely.
interface.longDescription: A Codex CLI operations pack for local CLI surface inspection, non-interactive exec and review automation, live multi-thread supervision with controlled skill handoffs and versioned evidence corrections, plugin marketplace and MCP server lifecycle work, doctor/debug/sandbox/app-server diagnostics, redacted session log forensics, and Codex app local environment actions.
capabilities: Local Codex CLI version, help, command, flag, and safety inspection
Non-interactive codex exec automation with cwd, sandbox, approval, JSONL, output schema, and last-message handling
Codex review commands for uncommitted changes, base-branch diffs, and commit review
Codex plugin marketplace visibility, install, removal, and cache-check workflows
Codex MCP server list, get, add, remove, login, logout, stdio, HTTP, bearer-token-env, and OAuth workflows
Codex doctor, debug, feature flag, sandbox denial, app-server, remote-control, and remote connection diagnostics
Live Codex task and thread supervision with cursor-based transitions, attention gates, controlled skill handoffs, versioned evidence corrections, and privacy-safe capability mining
Redacted Codex rollout JSONL discovery, lineage normalization, active-scope views, deterministic trace audits, search, and log health checks
Codex app local environment.toml actions for Run, Test, Preview, dev server, browser, and simulator workflows
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me operate, automate, or debug the Codex CLI safely.
